name: Avarga Limited
summary: Avarga Limited, an investment holding company, engages in manufacturing and trading of paper products, and providing management services in Canada, the United States, Malaysia, Singapore, Myanmar, Sri Lanka, Australia, and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Paper Mill, Power Plant, Building Products, and Others. The company manufactures and sells industrial grade paper products, such as test liner, corrugating medium, chipboard, and core boards that are primarily used to manufacture corrugated carton boxes and other finished paper products. It also collects and trades in waste paper products. In addition, the company operates a 50 megawatt gas-fired electricity plant in Ywama, Myanmar, which sells its electricity to the Myanmar Government. Further, it distributes building materials, such as lumber, panels, moldings, sidings, engineered wood, flooring, roofing, insulations, and others. Additionally, the company engages in property rental and management activities. The company was formerly known as UPP Holdings Limited and changed its name to Avarga Limited in April 2018. Avarga Limited was founded in 1967 and is based in Singapore.
